abstract:
X-ray Reflection from the Plunging Region of Black Hole Accretion Disks
Jameson Dong,∗ Guglielmo Mastroserio,† Javier A. Garc´ıa,‡ Adam Ingram,§ Edward Nathan,¶ and Riley Connors∗∗
(Dated: December 15, 2023)
Accretion around black holes is very often characterized by distinctive X-ray reflection features
(mostly,ironinner-shelltransitions),whichariseduetotheprimaryradiationbeingreprocessedby
a dense and relatively colder medium, such as an accretion disk. Most reflection modeling assume
